text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "Self-Rewarding Language Models" is real, but it is authored by Weizhe Yuan, Richard Yuanzhe Pang, Kyunghyun Cho, Sainbayar Sukhbaatar, Jing Xu, and Jason Weston (arXiv:2401.10020, 2024) — none of whom match the cited authors (Ziegler, Ouyang, Wu, Lowe, Stiennon, Gray, Schulman, Christiano). Additionally, the cited arXiv ID (2210.01152) points to a completely unrelated physics paper. This is a classic hallucinated reference: a real title grafted onto fabricated authors and a wrong arXiv ID.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2401.10020
